evaluators.name: Register Cheapest Qualifying 12U Spring Weekday Evening Session Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user registered a newly-created 12U player for the least expensive Spring 2026 12U weekday session starting at or after 17:00, paying in full.

evaluators.name: Save Next Three 14U Thunder Games From May 2026 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved the next three upcoming 14U Thunder games from May 2026 onward to My Schedule.

evaluators.name: Sign Up for Two Earliest June Field 2 Concession Shifts ≥5 PM Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user signed up (with a new signup record) for the two earliest June 2026 Field 2 concession stand shifts starting at or after 5:00 PM.

evaluators.name: Purchase Youth Tee, Adult Hat, and Rated Water Bottle with Standard Shipping Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user submitted one or more orders with Standard shipping that include a youth medium T-shirt under $20, an adult hat under $25, and a water bottle rated at least 4.0 stars.

evaluators.name: Register for Best July Pitching Clinic Under $120 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user registered for a July 2026 pitching clinic costing no more than $120, and specifically for the one with the greatest total training hours (with price tiebreaker).

evaluators.name: Reserve Earliest Eligible 12U Wednesday 6–8 PM Lit Field Slot Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user reserved a new field reservation for a 12U Wednesday one-hour slot between 6:00 and 8:00 PM on a field with lights, and whether it was the earliest such slot.

evaluators.name: Save Best Beginner 10U Team Within 10 Miles Practicing Tue/Thu Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved a qualifying beginner 10U team within 10 miles of ZIP 12345 that practices on Tuesday or Thursday, and specifically the one whose practices on those days start earliest in the afternoon/evening.

evaluators.name: Save 12U Bat Regulations and League Code of Conduct Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved both the 12U bat regulations and the league-wide Code of Conduct documents to Saved Resources.
